resultList.dtldesc: Experience luxury elevated living with this exquisite 3 BHK penthouse for sale in the upscale neighborhood of Thaltej, Ahmedabad. Boasting a blend of panoramic views, premium amenities, and sophisticated design, this penthouse offers the perfect canvas for a refined and luxurious lifestyle.Property Specifications Spanning a carpet area of 180 sq. yards, the penthouse is situated on the 4th floor of a low-rise building, making it a private and peaceful retreat in the heart of the city. The layout includes 3 spacious bedrooms and 3 bathrooms2 attached and 1 common. Among them, 2 are western-style bathrooms and 1 is Indian-style, all with provisions for geysers. A bright living and dining area provides a welcoming space for everyday living and entertaining. The penthouse also features a balcony attached to one of the bedrooms, overlooking a well-maintained garden and offering refreshing green views.The modular kitchen is fully functional and equipped with a piped gas connection and a dedicated utility area. The interiors are finished with a mix of elegant marble and tile flooring. This east-facing home is Vaastu compliant, designed to attract natural light and positive energy throughout the day. Thoughtfully designed and move-in ready, this penthouse is ideal for those seeking luxury, comfort, and a well-connected location in Ahmedabad.Facilities The penthouse is supported by essential facilities that enhance convenience and security for residents. It includes both covered and open parking spaces, ensuring ample room for personal and guest vehicles. A 24-hour water supply guarantees uninterrupted daily use, while a dedicated security guard and CCTV surveillance provide a safe and secure living environment for you and your family.Locality Located in the prime area of Thaltej on Gulab Tower Road, this penthouse enjoys a well-established and highly convenient neighborhood. The locality is known for its peaceful environment and excellent connectivity, making it a preferred choice for families and professionals alike. Renowned schools are just 200 meters away, ensuring easy access to quality education. Hospitals, malls, supermarkets, banks, and ATMs are all within close walking distance, catering to your everyday needs. Public transport is readily available, with buses and autos frequently operating in the area. Additionally, Chandlodia Railway Station is just 34 km away, offering smooth connectivity to other parts of the city and beyond.
